case_title: CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. VS. RENATO CRUZ

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.
